title: Artificial Intelligence Troubleshooting Part 6C Project
tagline: Build a mini application using Artificial Intelligence Troubleshooting Part 6C
description: Create a working Artificial Intelligence application demonstrating Artificial Intelligence Troubleshooting Part 6C.
starterCode:
# Python implementation for Artificial Intelligence Troubleshooting Part 6C
def process_data(records):
    """Process input dataset cleanly."""
    results = [item.strip().upper() for item in records if item]
    return results

if __name__ == '__main__':
    data = ['apple', 'banana', 'cherry']
    print('Processed:', process_data(data))
solution:
# Python implementation for Artificial Intelligence Troubleshooting Part 6C
def process_data(records):
    """Process input dataset cleanly."""
    results = [item.strip().upper() for item in records if item]
    return results

if __name__ == '__main__':
    data = ['apple', 'banana', 'cherry']
    print('Processed:', process_data(data))
solutionExpl: This solution demonstrates clean application of Artificial Intelligence Troubleshooting Part 6C in Artificial Intelligence.
